name: gavel
description: Minimalism + QA discipline. YAGNI, stdlib first, framework-adaptive test quality enforcement.

interface.longDescription: Framework-adaptive QA toolkit for AI agents. Enforces test quality via the QA Ladder and Test Constitution while preserving YAGNI minimalism.
defaultPrompt: Use gavel mode for this test task.
Review this test diff for constitution violations.
Diagnose why this test is failing.
